title: Xcut 4.5" Micro Craft Scissors, Soft Grip & Non-Stick, Art, Craft Accessories, Stainless-Steel Blade, Multi-Purpose Scissors, Sewing, Fabric, Dress Making Supplies, Crafting, Paper & Card Craft
features: DESIGN These 4.5" micro craft scissors feature soft grip handles for extra comfort and stainless steel blade. Essentials supplies for crafting set or bag
TOOLS Trim, cut and create with accuracy and precision. Xcut scissors are a cut above the rest! The cutting tool for every craft project and creation. Micro scissors are suitable for small hands
IDEAL Craft scissors are suitable for use on paper, card, vellum, felt, foam, fabric and more. Great for scrapbooking, sewing, embroidery stitch, paper & card crafts. Suitable household use scissors
USE Ideal for home or school use. Basics stationery items are essential accessories for art and craft set. Easy-grip handles and non-stick stainless-steel blade ensures these scissors make light work

BRAND Xcut are a leading brand in cutting craft tools, offering reliable and long-lasting tool. Xcut always create innovative, high quality accessories – precision products designed for life! Everything you need to make precision cutting a snip
